textPlain: The fact that the first ad on the page (for me) is a scam for "Free Robux!" is hilarious.
What a great website, didn’t realize it existed.  I don’t particularly care about kirkwood gaps but it’s nice to know there is an alternative to google search for kids.

unfortunately it fails on the one thing my kid searches for 
https://www.kiddle.co/i.php?q=coloring+page+moana#gsc.tab=1&...
(but I do realize "kid-friendly search engine" is a huge challenge and applaud the effort)
